scripts.gateway:roundrobin: cp ./gateway/TDWA05-01-Gateway/ocelot.roundrobin.json ./gateway/TDWA05-01-Gateway/ocelot.json && DOTNET_CLI_HOME=/tmp NUGET_PACKAGES=/tmp/nuget DOTNET_ROOT="../.dotnet8" PATH="../.dotnet8:$PATH" ASPNETCORE_URLS="${ASPNETCORE_URLS:-http://localhost:5001}" ../.dotnet8/dotnet run --project ./gateway/TDWA05-01-Gateway
